---
title: "Research"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <h1>Research</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">I find a measurement problem, build the tool, and move on.</p>
</div>

<p class="research-intro">
  The common thread across all my work: complex systems that produce signals we don&rsquo;t yet
  know how to interpret. A feeding fly. A manuscript under review. A genome-wide RNA modification
  map. In each case, the scientific question requires inventing the measurement framework first.
</p>

<div class="research-grid">

  <div class="research-card">
    <span class="output-tag">Nature Methods &mdash; in revision</span>
    <h3>DABEST 2.0</h3>
    <p>
      Bootstrap-coupled effect size estimation for multi-group comparisons.
      Replaces p-values with estimation graphics: mean differences, confidence intervals,
      and the full sampling distribution of your effect. The delta-delta plot &mdash; my
      original contribution &mdash; handles 2&times;2 factorial designs and beyond.
    </p>
    <a href="01_dabest.html">&rarr; Interactive demo</a>
  </div>

  <div class="research-card">
    <span class="output-tag">Science Advances &mdash; in revision</span>
    <h3>Ethomics / DESTRA</h3>
    <p>
      High-dimensional behavioural state benchmarking in <em>Drosophila</em>.
      The Espresso platform captures 17 behavioural metrics simultaneously.
      DESTRA uses bootstrap effect size profiles to ask: does this manipulation
      produce genuine hunger, or just a superficially similar signature?
    </p>
    <a href="02_ethomics.html">&rarr; Interactive demo</a>
  </div>

  <div class="research-card">
    <span class="output-tag">Current Biology 2017 &mdash; 48 citations</span>
    <h3>Intertemporal Choice</h3>
    <p>
      Dorsal raphe serotonergic neurons bidirectionally control delay discounting in
      <em>Drosophila</em>. Activation increases patience; silencing increases impulsivity.
      Effect is trade-off specific &mdash; not a motor or motivational confound.
    </p>
    <a href="03_itc.html">&rarr; Project page</a>
  </div>

  <div class="research-card">
    <span class="output-tag">In development</span>
    <h3>LLM Evaluation Pipeline</h3>
    <p>
      Adversarial multi-agent pipeline for scientific manuscript evaluation.
      Four LLM subagents &mdash; biologist, bioinformatician, reviewer, editor &mdash;
      argue toward a structured critique. Building toward bootstrap-estimated
      inter-rater calibration against human expert reviewers.
    </p>
    <a href="04_llm_evals.html">&rarr; Notebook</a>
  </div>

  <div class="research-card">
    <span class="output-tag">PNAS 2020 &mdash; 119 citations</span>
    <h3>Noradrenergic Attention</h3>
    <p>
      Two distinct noradrenergic pathways implement different attentional control mechanisms
      in rodents. Selective lesions of each reveal a functional dissociation not apparent
      from anatomy alone.
    </p>
    <a href="cv.html">&rarr; Full publication</a>
  </div>

  <div class="research-card stub">
    <span class="output-tag">Coming soon</span>
    <h3>Epitranscriptomics</h3>
    <p>
      Direct RNA nanopore sequencing pipeline for m6A and pseudouridine mapping.
      Running on local GPU. Connects back to the behavioural work: does hunger
      change the RNA modification landscape in serotonergic neurons?
    </p>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="section-divider">&bull; &bull; &bull;</div>

<div style="max-width: 680px; margin: 0 auto 4rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; text-align: center;">
  <p style="font-style: italic; color: var(--warm-grey); font-size: 1.05rem;">
    All computational tools are built in Python and released as open-source packages.<br>
    DABEST: <a href="https://github.com/ACCLAB/DABEST-python">ACCLAB/DABEST-python</a>
  </p>
</div>
```
